title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition
notes: You need to set launch option in Steam : PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command% Else it will not start, also bypass launcher when launching it in Steam

title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition
notes: Crashes when viewing postgame timeline, otherwise no problems

title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition
notes: Launch options "PROTON_USE_WINE3D11=1 %command%" and select (Bypass Launcher) at start.

title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition

notes: Launcher has to be skipped. Music tears while loading the map.
title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition

notes: Used the "PROTON_USE_WINE3D11=1 %command%" launch setting. Without that, game stutters sometimes. Runs a little slower than normal, still perfectly playable though.
title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition

notes: Bypassing the launcher and using Wine D3D11 was needed. Game mostly runs fine, but it lags a bit and load times are long.
title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition

notes: Plays great right out of the box. I recommend skipping the launcher but it's not required anymore.
title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition

notes: I played this a lot completed the game now playing  expansion pack. Works great no problem at all.. Oh You have to bypass Launcher for it to work.. Thats so easy steam gives you that option when launching
title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition

notes: I could not see any issues at all in my entire play through, over 7 hours. I had the max settings, and got a stable frame rate. Comparable to Windows. If you bought this and thought it was native, and found out it wasn't native, you'd be surprised that it wasn't native due to how well it runs.
title: Age of Mythology: Extended Edition

notes: Worked perfect.
